title: Autonomous Runtime Audits
purpose: Implement scheduled runtime governance audits to continuously verify runtime health, detect governance drift, and detect integrity violations.
architectural_constraints: Audits must not impact runtime performance above 5 percent CPU
acceptance_criteria: 6 audit categories run on schedule: schema integrity, dependency integrity, milestone consistency, runtime continuity, projection validity, event consistency
Schema integrity validated against canonical schemas
Dependency integrity checks catch missing references
Event consistency verified with no gaps
Audit reports include severity scores and remediation suggestions

failure_modes.mitigation: Resource limits, background execution, throttling during peak load
Severity thresholds, deduplication, trend-based alerting only

traceability.description: Implemented autonomous runtime audits with 6 categories, deterministic severity scoring (0-100), JSON/Markdown reports, and 16 integration tests
